name: guru-check-task
description: Check a complete task through scope-first semantic review, full validation evidence, Docs SSOT reconciliation, finding reruns, and four typed exits.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory, schema, and phase2 record/check runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime

entry_preconditions.evidence: direct active task locator, task.json, ignored runtime workspace mapping, checkout, and source boundary facts
entry_preconditions.binding: one active task in its expected worktree

entry_preconditions.evidence: checker-validated current guru-planning-approval-2.0 approved artifact and three planning documents
entry_preconditions.freshness: planning checker and document digests rerun

entry_preconditions.evidence: current approved load-bearing provenance and requirement authorities
completed implement-agent handoff with files, Docs SSOT execution, tests, risks, and deferred validation
entry_preconditions.binding: implementation claimed for this task snapshot
entry_preconditions.freshness: reviewed in the current complete round

entry_preconditions.evidence: repository-defined lint, type, test, schema, generated, drift, install, and update commands plus explicit non-applicability
entry_preconditions.freshness: commands and results belong to the current round

entry_preconditions.evidence: approved strategy, durable paths, task delta, task-history-only content, and merge/no-update/follow-up boundary
entry_preconditions.freshness: locator and affected path digests are current

entry_preconditions.evidence: current primary, close, related, follow-up, and decision categories
implementation/check assignment and complete failed, unfinished, stale, replacement, and completed recovery chain
base, HEAD, diff range, complete dirty paths, reviewed paths and digests
entry_preconditions.freshness: rebuilt around record and during check

entry_preconditions.evidence: mode, all entry projections, scope candidates, adequacy, findings, unverified items, Gate, typed exit, route, consumer and facts digest
entry_preconditions.freshness: checker rejects stale, partial, multiple, or mismatched evidence

validators.objective_scope: AI-authored closed input consumption; task, approved planning, ledger, agent, repository and reviewed-path fact rebuild; schema, reference, digest, full-round and exit/consumer validation; single artifact write

published v2 schema, current task/planning/ledger/agent/HEAD/diff/dirty/reviewed-path facts, scope/finding references, full-round identity, Gate/exit/route/consumer union, artifact digest and post-commit coverage

external_exits.evidence: all adequacy dimensions passed, no open current-scope finding or blocking unverified item, complete recovery, and current full rerun
one or more open findings in current approved scope
planning evidence is stale or a candidate requires requirement, authority, or scope change
required evidence or an external dependency prevents a reliable complete check

reentry.identity: mode, task, approved planning, authorities, Docs SSOT plan, ledger, implementation/worker evidence, command results, repository snapshot, scope/adequacy/findings/unverified digests, full-round identity, Gate, exit, route, consumer and facts digest
reentry.freshness: every implementation fix or planning/authority/ledger/agent/repository drift reruns all eleven entry checks and the complete task scope
